profileDescription: Update your account's profile information and avatar
bioDescription: Brief description for your profile. Max 160 characters
websiteDescription: Your personal website or portfolio URL
privacyDescription: Control who can see your profile and posts
publicAccountDescription: Anyone can see your profile and posts
privateAccountDescription: Only approved followers can see your posts
blockedUsersDescription: Users you've blocked can't see your posts or send you messages.
mutedUsersDescription: Muted users' posts won't appear in your feed. They can still see your content.
passwordDescription: Update your password to keep your account secure
newPasswordDescription: Must be at least 10 characters with one uppercase and one special character
setPasswordDescription: Your account was created with OAuth (Google / GitHub). Set a password to also sign in with your email.
setPasswordHint: No current password needed — you signed in via an OAuth provider
changePasswordConfirmDescription: Changing your password will sign you out of all active sessions, including this one. You will need to sign in again with your new password.
sessionsDescription: Manage devices that are currently logged into your account
logoutAllDialogDescription: This will log you out from all devices except this one. You'll need to log in again on those devices.
twoFaDescription: Add an extra layer of security to your account using a TOTP authenticator app.
twoFaIdleDescription: Two-factor authentication adds an extra layer of security. You'll need your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.) each time you log in.
twoFaSetupDescription: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app, or enter the secret key manually.
twoFaScannedButton: I've scanned the QR code — Continue
twoFaVerifyDescription: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to confirm setup.
twoFaBackupCodesWarning: Save these backup codes in a safe place. Each code can only be used once if you lose access to your authenticator app.
twoFaActiveDescription: Two-factor authentication is active on your account. You'll be asked for a code each time you sign in.
twoFaDisableDescription: Enter your current TOTP code or a backup code to disable 2FA.
notifDescription: Choose what notifications you want to receive
notifLikeDescription: Get notified when someone likes your post
notifCommentDescription: Get notified when someone comments on your post
notifFollowDescription: Get notified when someone follows you
notifMentionDescription: Get notified when someone mentions you
pageSubtitle: This is the settings page. You can put your user settings here.
profilePageDescription: View the profile of a specific user on Pixel social media.
profileNotFoundMessage: The profile you're looking for doesn't exist.
profileIsPrivateMessage: Follow this account to see their posts.
